channel.title: GitHub Logos Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Logos in GitHub

item.title: YTLitePlus/YTLitePlus
item.description: A modified version of Youtube for iOS supercharged with YTLite (by @dayanch96) and +20 tweaks

item.title: arichornlover/YouTubeRebornPlus
item.description: LillieH1000’s YouTube Reborn but with even more features!

item.title: khanhduytran0/TrollPad
item.description: Troll SpringBoard into thinking it's running on iPadOS

item.title: jjolano/shadow
item.description: A jailbreak detection bypass for modern iOS jailbreaks.
